question.text: The FX-Retail platform was launched by which entity and in which year?

answer.text: Clearing Corporation of India Limited (CCIL) in August 2019
Reserve Bank of India (RBI) in January 2020
Financial Benchmarks India Private Limited (FBIL) in July 2019

explanation.text: **The Logic:** FX-Retail was rolled out by CCIL on August 5, 2019 to provide transparent and fair pricing for retail forex customers. It was introduced at RBI's initiative. **The Trap:** RBI initiated the platform but CCIL actually operates it. **Cross-Exam Context:** Retail forex infrastructure is tested in Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** FX-Retail addresses the disadvantage retail customers faced in one-to-one negotiations with banks, where large customers had more bargaining power.
